description: Machine-readable changelog of Jerboa API drift. Consumers (LLM tooling, lints, jerboa_verify) use this to invalidate stale recommendations and to suggest migrations when a symbol is renamed or relocated.

entry_fields.version: Optional Jerboa release tag if cut
entry_fields.moved: Array of {symbol, from_module, to_module, reason} for symbols whose primary export module changed
entry_fields.tier_changes: Array of {symbol_or_module, from, to} where from/to are core/stable/compat/unstable

entries.notes: Baseline snapshot: 626 modules, 12,393 symbols, 18,925 exports. Tiers: 18 core, 489 stable, 43 compat, 76 unstable. Prior changelog entries were not captured machine-readably; this file starts here and `scripts/diff-api-signatures.py` appends new entries going forward.
